name: Aarav Mehta
designation: AI Product Lead at Nova Systems
bio: Building practical AI workflows for enterprise teams that want faster experimentation without adding process drag.
about: Aarav leads applied AI initiatives across internal tooling and customer-facing workflows. He enjoys mentoring early-stage builders, product strategy discussions, and thoughtful conversations about model reliability.

name: Maya Reynolds
bio: Helping B2B startups turn scattered brand stories into clear product narratives that convert with less noise.
about: Maya founded Studio Orbit after a decade in brand strategy. She works closely with founders on positioning, launch stories, and go-to-market messaging that still feels human.

name: Rohan Patel
bio: Focused on climate, frontier tech, and founders who know how to balance velocity with long-term conviction.
about: Rohan backs seed and Series A teams working in climate software, industrial systems, and infrastructure. He is especially interested in businesses with strong technical defensibility.

name: Nina Alvarez
bio: Scaling demand generation with sharper experimentation loops, better lifecycle design, and teams that actually talk to each other.
about: Nina has spent the last seven years building growth programs for SaaS and fintech brands. She likes clean funnels, strong attribution, and making creative teams feel close to performance data.

name: Ethan Brooks
designation: Senior Software Architect at Cedar Labs
bio: Designing resilient platforms, calmer developer workflows, and systems that are easier to evolve under real pressure.
about: Ethan works across backend architecture, developer tooling, and platform modernization. He enjoys untangling legacy systems and turning operational pain into maintainable patterns.

name: Zoya Khan
bio: Translating messy user behavior into product clarity through deep interviews, synthesis, and grounded design recommendations.
about: Zoya leads mixed-method research for collaboration products. She is especially interested in workplace behavior, inclusive design systems, and how research changes product strategy when it is shared well.

name: Daniel Kim
bio: Improving operational reliability with better process design, field tooling, and metrics people can trust under load.
about: Daniel has built logistics and operations systems across delivery, warehousing, and internal planning. He likes turning ambiguous execution problems into repeatable operating models.

name: Priya Sethi
bio: Designing communities that create genuine belonging, useful conversations, and steady value beyond the launch moment.
about: Priya works with founder and operator communities across events, partnerships, and member programs. She cares about thoughtful facilitation and long-term trust over surface-level engagement.

name: Luca Moretti
designation: Design Systems Engineer at Tidal Suite
bio: Bridging design and engineering with accessible components, better tokens, and a lot less handoff friction.
about: Luca maintains multi-platform UI infrastructure across web and mobile surfaces. He spends most of his time on accessibility, component APIs, and keeping design systems ergonomic for product teams.

name: Sara Thompson
bio: Connecting health-tech teams, channel partners, and operators around partnerships that hold up after the pitch deck.
about: Sara builds strategic partnerships across digital health, provider networks, and enterprise distribution. She enjoys turning warm conversations into strong working relationships with real operational follow-through.

name: Kabir Rao
designation: Machine Learning Engineer at Vector Forge
bio: Shipping production ML systems with better observability, sensible evaluation, and fewer mystery regressions.
about: Kabir works on ranking and recommendation systems for consumer products. He is interested in data quality, evaluation tooling, and collaboration patterns between ML and product teams.

name: Olivia Park
bio: Advising venture-backed teams on fundraising, commercial contracts, and the quiet legal details that matter later.
about: Olivia supports founders through formation, fundraising, and scaling milestones. She likes practical legal guidance that helps teams move with confidence instead of adding avoidable friction.

name: Noah Fischer
bio: Aligning sales, success, and finance around cleaner data, better forecasting, and workflows that teams actually use.
about: Noah runs revenue operations for a fast-growing B2B team. He spends time on pipeline hygiene, process design, and tooling decisions that reduce reporting chaos for GTM teams.

name: Isha Verma
designation: Founder in Residence at Ember Capital
bio: Exploring new company ideas at the edge of commerce, identity, and trust on the internet.
about: Isha works with founders and investors on company formation, GTM discovery, and narrative shaping. She is especially interested in products that help small businesses operate with more leverage.

name: Marcus Allen
bio: Helping teams build practical security habits without turning every product conversation into a compliance maze.
about: Marcus advises startups and growth-stage companies on security posture, architecture reviews, and incident preparation. He values security work that enables shipping instead of stalling it.

name: Anika Bose
designation: People Operations Partner at Atlas Core
bio: Shaping healthier teams through better hiring loops, manager enablement, and human systems that scale with care.
about: Anika works across hiring, onboarding, and internal operating rhythm. She believes the best people systems reduce ambiguity while still leaving room for individual judgment.

name: Theo Martin
bio: Backing ambitious early teams and helping them sharpen hiring, pricing, and their first repeatable operating cadence.
about: Theo is a former operator turned active angel investor. He works closely with founders on early GTM systems, leadership hiring, and avoiding preventable execution bottlenecks.

name: Leila Haddad
designation: Sustainability Program Manager at Terra Loop
bio: Driving cross-functional climate programs with strong stakeholder alignment and metrics that survive executive review.
about: Leila coordinates sustainability programs across operations, policy, and product teams. She is motivated by practical decarbonization work and clear communication across complex initiatives.

name: Arjun Nair
designation: Mobile Engineering Lead at Current Path
bio: Building mobile experiences that feel fast, calm, and durable under the weird realities of production apps.
about: Arjun leads mobile engineering across React Native and native platform teams. He likes strong architecture, animation discipline, and practical performance work that users can feel.

name: Clara Dupont
designation: Customer Success Strategist at Quiet River
bio: Helping post-sale teams create calmer onboarding journeys, smarter adoption moments, and stronger renewals.
about: Clara works with SaaS teams on onboarding design, customer education, and expansion strategy. She is especially interested in product-led adoption signals and long-term account health.
